sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73568" key="o(modhme/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμοδημ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n73568.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be of the same people with,</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.823b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
